Index.title: Sanad - Smart Document Platform
Index.description: Your best, most secure, and fastest platform to process PDF files and documents locally and in the cloud.
Index.toolsTitle: Everything you need to handle PDF files
Index.toolsSubtitle: A comprehensive suite of tools to manage, edit, and convert your PDF files easily and securely.

tools.mergeDesc: Combine multiple PDFs into one unified document easily.
tools.splitDesc: Separate one page or a whole set for easy conversion into independent PDF files.
tools.removePagesDesc: Remove pages from a PDF document.
tools.extractPagesDesc: Get a new document containing only the desired pages.
tools.organizePdfDesc: Sort pages of your PDF file however you like.
tools.compressDesc: Reduce file size while optimizing for maximal PDF quality.
tools.repairDesc: Recover data from a corrupted or damaged PDF document.
tools.jpgToPdfDesc: Convert JPG images to PDF in seconds.
tools.wordToPdfDesc: Make DOC and DOCX files easy to read by converting them to PDF.
tools.powerpointToPdfDesc: Make PPT and PPTX slideshows easy to view by converting them to PDF.
tools.excelToPdfDesc: Make EXCEL spreadsheets easy to read by converting them to PDF.
tools.htmlToPdfDesc: Convert webpages in HTML to PDF.
tools.pdfToJpgDesc: Extract all images contained in a PDF or convert each page to a JPG.
tools.pdfToWordDesc: Easily convert your PDF files into easy to edit DOC and DOCX documents.
tools.pdfToPowerpointDesc: Turn your PDF files into easy to edit PPT and PPTX slideshows.
tools.pdfToExcelDesc: Pull data straight from PDFs into EXCEL spreadsheets.
tools.pdfToPdfADesc: Transform your PDF to PDF/A, the ISO-standardized version of PDF for long-term archiving.
tools.rotatePdfDesc: Rotate your PDFs the way you need them.
tools.addWatermarkDesc: Stamp an image or text over your PDF in seconds.
tools.addPageNumbersDesc: Add page numbers into PDFs with ease.
tools.unlockPdfDesc: Remove PDF password security, giving you the freedom to use your PDFs as you want.
tools.protectPdfDesc: Encrypt your PDF with a password to keep sensitive data confidential.
tools.signPdfDesc: Add your own electronic signature to your PDF document.

Auth.loginCreateAccount: create a new account for free
